completed_tasks.progress: v1.1-beta.20 shipped to provide the build for multi-user UAT; user-side has only seen single-DAW play-test

remaining_tasks.name: Manual standalone UAT under TSan, populated server, 30+ min
Audible glitches + CPU history pattern check
lldb attach + read 6 production drop-counter accessors at session-end (all must == 0)
Instruments Time Profiler 60s under broadcast load — BlockRecord memcpy CPU < 5%

blockers.description: User-reported high cache writes — investigation incomplete; no JamWide-specific writes found in ~/Library or /tmp; vscode-cpptools at 5.7GB stood out but not confirmed. User has not yet reported back which process/path is writing.
blockers.workaround: Asked user for Activity Monitor → Disk view (process + bytes written) and target path. Suspect vscode-cpptools clangd indexing churning over 15+ commits to njclient.cpp.

human_actions_pending.action: Multi-user populated-server UAT on v1.1-beta.20 — bundled UAT for 07a/07c/09/08 + 07b regression check + broadcast continuity
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 15.1 cannot formally close without Signals 1c/3/6/7. v1.1-beta.20 shipped specifically to enable other beta testers to install and join sessions.

human_actions_pending.action: Localize cache-write source (Activity Monitor → Disk view, sort by Bytes Written, identify process + path)
human_actions_pending.context: User reported extremely high cache writes; investigation found no JamWide-specific source. Need user to point at the writer.

human_actions_pending.action: Optional: lldb counter readout (Signal 6) and Instruments perf budget (Signal 7) on local build
human_actions_pending.context: Quick mechanical signals that can be done without multi-user; useful if multi-user UAT is delayed.

decisions.decision: Bundled UAT scope: 07a + 07c + 09 + 08 deferred to 15.1-10 phase-end UAT (not per-plan)
decisions.rationale: User direction at start of 07c work. Cost: 3 stabilization cycles when 07a regressions surfaced in single-user UAT. Acceptable given each cycle was diagnose→surgical-fix→rebuild→verify (no patch piles).

decisions.decision: PR #14 (steveseguin VDO sync) merged BEFORE pushing 15.1 work
decisions.rationale: PR was opened pre-15.1; clean rebase placed PR commits below 15.1 in history, preserving authorship and CI signal separation.

decisions.decision: Beta numbering continued v1.1-beta.20 (skipping 19 since v1.1-beta.19-no-video was a one-off variant) instead of starting v1.2-beta.1
decisions.rationale: Respects existing convention. v1.2.0 stable can come later when milestone formally closes.

decisions.decision: Architecture-mirror dead-but-live finding (njclient.cpp:1648 lobby renormalize) flagged in deferred-items.md as VERIFIED-UNREACHABLE rather than fixed
decisions.rationale: .continue-here.md option (b) — currently dead in modern JamWide; one-line surgical fix can land in v1.3 cleanup.

decisions.decision: VST3 rebuilt locally to build 291 (post-PR #14 merge) for parity with CI artifacts
decisions.rationale: User asked for parity so they can DAW-test exactly what other beta testers receive.

next_action: Resume by checking gh release v1.1-beta.20 status (CI artifacts uploaded?), then either: (a) wait for multi-user UAT feedback from beta testers; (b) execute Signal 6 (lldb counter readout) + Signal 7 (Instruments) locally to close the mechanical signals; (c) investigate user's cache-write report when they reply with localization info.
context_notes: Phase 15.1 implementation is FUNCTIONALLY COMPLETE. All 10 plans landed, 3 post-UAT stabilization fixes shipped, beta released. Open: bundled multi-user UAT (intentionally requires beta installation by other users) + cache-write investigation (awaiting user info). The three 07a stabilization fixes (b9899a0/e827453/e151dd8 in pushed history; b8ca083/7e69e1a/00dfee7 in local pre-rebase history) all share root cause — slot picking placed on wrong thread; the apply-visitor fix is the architecturally correct one. feedback_legacy_invariant_audit.md updated with all three Direction A/B/C patterns from this session.
